results.title: ‘Toy Story 5’ tackles tech tensions and tween girl trials
results.description: EMERYVILLE, Calif. — For actor Joan Cusack, who voices the animated cowgirl Jessie in Disney’s “Toy Story 5,” it was important that the film tell a different kind of story — one centered on the experiences of girls. The post ‘Toy Story 5’ tackles tech tensions and tween girl trials appeared first on West Hawaii Today .

results.title: Editorial: Work together to help keiki thrive
results.description: Last Thursday, this newspaper featured three very intriguing stories — seemingly unrelated at first blush, but upon closer look, quite connected in what they portend for Hawaii’s keiki, the next generation and this state’s future.

results.title: Grading the internet's dating advice (Matthew Yglesias/Slow Boring)
results.description: Matthew Yglesias / Slow Boring : Grading the internet's dating advice — Every young person needs a married political pundit's take on dating — I'm officially #old so haven't been in the market for dating advice since before the emergence of modern short-form video and swiping-based apps.
